channel.title: Posts on Anfernee Jervis
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Anfernee Jervis

item.title: 'Sane'itizing MTA's Turnstile Datasets: Geotagging
item.description: Update: Looks like others have geotagged the turnstile dataset too.

item.title: Scarcity in an Ocean of Knowledge
item.description: I wrote down the three things I wanted to work on today; one being a blog post on how I automated adding content to the blog that you’re currently reading.

item.title: The "Two Laptops" Problem
item.description: About three years ago, I bought a decked out XPS 13 to replace a five year old Thinkpad E535 I had.
